Header.search: What do you want to learn?

Footer.description: An interactive platform for learning programming.

Welcome.title: Learn Programming with CODEMY
Welcome.description: An interactive platform for learning programming. Get access to courses that will help you develop skills and understand real-world examples

Expectations.title: What awaits you on the platform?
Expectations.description: Access convenient programming courses, track your progress, and practice with real code examples

variety.title: Variety of Courses
variety.description: The platform offers courses on programming and other topics. All lessons are available at any time.

practice.title: Code Practice
practice.description: Write code and see the result instantly in our interactive editor.

ai.title: AI Assistant
ai.description: A personal mentor will help you tackle complex topics whenever you need.

theory.title: Theory
theory.description: Master the material through structured lectures and visual examples.

code-editor.title: Code Editor
code-editor.description: Practice directly in your browser with instant result verification.

web-page.title: Live Preview
web-page.description: Watch changes in real-time. Your code comes to life instantly.

ai.title: AI Mentor
ai.description: Your personal assistant to explain complex topics and help fix code errors.

PopularCourses.title: Popular Courses
PopularCourses.description: The most popular courses among our platform users

StartToday.title: Start learning now
StartToday.description: All materials are available completely free — start your journey today.

My-Learning.title: My learning
My-Learning.goalsDescription: Take as many lessons as possible to reach your goals

cover.title: Cover
cover.description: Choose a cover that will grab viewers' attention.
